{{CargoOrgan
|name=Crown of Sin
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10715
|idx=73
|description="The Federation's expeditionary force was erased in an instant—we didn’t even see It move! When crimson rain began to fall from the sky… it was already too late."
— Demon King's Revelation
|skill=Create a domain with fighting spirit, absorbing DMG equal to 36% of the enemy's ATK and reflecting the absorbed damage back to the enemy!
|hp=3540
|def=251
|atk=222
|rush=243
|gene1=Per Xenoking Organ implanted, {race} HP +420
Xenoking Organs implanted: 7/7
|gene2=Snail Arena, CRIT DMG +20%
|gene3=In Snail Arena, {race} HP +1400
|gene4=Restore 800 HP each round
|gene5=Water DMG +120
|gene6=Snail Arena, All ELMT RES +2%
|gene7=Snail Arena, CRIT DMG +20% (Awakened)
|}}
